signals.npcLine: Markets shudder; shadows whisper on fading credits.
signals.questPulse: Seek the lost crypto nodes before they vanish.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto tides recede; silent fears grip the net.
signals.clueEvent: Value drip detected in digital vaults.

signals.npcLine: AI protocols spike, servers detecting anomalous patterns.
signals.questPulse: Investigate rogue AI chatter in blacknet sectors.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual AI data packets flooding cyber lanes.

signals.npcLine: Bio-circuits failing under market's cold shadow.
signals.questPulse: Recover compromised bio-data before it corrupts code.
signals.worldFeed: Bio-tech assets losing ground in sentiment crash.
signals.clueEvent: Vital encryptions flicker; biological traces detected.

signals.npcLine: Pengu units gathering; unknown motives behind the rise.
signals.questPulse: Track the movement; uncover hidden market puppeteers.
signals.worldFeed: Silent waves from obscure tokens unsettle systems.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter spikes around non-standard assets.

signals.npcLine: Old BTC legends murmur; fear dims their fire.
signals.questPulse: Find the last holdouts clinging to ancient chains.
signals.worldFeed: An echo of classics amidst digital decay.
